sections.name: Section I: Free-Response
sections.quote: Section I: Free-Response — 4 Questions | 40–45 Minutes | 50% of Score

parts.name: Question 1: Project Presentation
parts.toolNote: 20% of Score; 3 minutes prep, 3 minutes presentation
parts.quote: Question 1: Project Presentation (20% of Score) — Students deliver a presentation in response to the project prompt about what they learned through their research.

parts.name: Question 2: Project Q&A
parts.toolNote: 15% of Score; respond to 4 pre-recorded questions, 40 seconds per response
parts.quote: Question 2: Project Q&A (15% of Score) — Students participate in a question-and-answer exchange about their project and research by responding to 4 pre-recorded questions that are not known to the student ahead of the exam.

parts.name: Question 3: Story Narration
parts.quote: Question 3: Story Narration (7.5% of Score) — Students write a story based on four provided pictures.

parts.name: Question 4: Email Response
parts.quote: Question 4: Email Response (7.5% of Score) — Students compose an email in response to an email received from a friend or member of the community.

sections.name: Section II: Multiple-Choice
sections.quote: Section II: Multiple-Choice — 55 Questions | 65 Minutes | 50% of Score

parts.name: Part A: Listening
parts.quote: Part A: Listening – 25 questions; 25 minutes; 25% of Score

parts.name: Part B: Reading
parts.quote: Part B: Reading – 30 questions; 40 minutes; 25% of Score

datasetDiscrepancies.quote: Section II: Multiple-Choice — 55 Questions | 65 Minutes | 50% of Score
